command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute 
SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.countryId, c.code as countryCode, c.name as countryName
FROM regions r
JOIN countries c ON c.id = r.countryId
WHERE c.code = 'LU' OR r.code LIKE 'LU%';

SELECT pt.id, pt.partnerId, p.companyName, r.code as regionCode, r.name as regionName
FROM partner_territories pt
JOIN partners p ON p.id = pt.partnerId
JOIN regions r ON r.id = pt.regionId
WHERE p.id = 60015 OR r.code LIKE 'LU%';

SELECT id, code, name FROM countries WHERE code = 'LU';
